lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Welcome to Sunlight's Sanctum. What will it be?

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Thank you. I like to think we have one of the nicest pubs in all of Varlamore, not that I can take much credit myself.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Well it's the Moonrise Brewery and Winery who own this place. It's only as nice as it is because of their continued investments.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So I'm guessing they care a lot about this place?

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Well I suppose it just makes sense for them. Keeping this pub in good condition keeps the locals happy, which is probably wise for a company that employs half of them.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: We also make plenty of money from all the tourists. Even before Varlamore opened up, Aldarin was a top holiday destination. That's easy money for the owners to help fund all their other ventures.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: And on that note, I'm guessing you came in for a drink? What will it be?
